error.extra: mabiao_set2(MABIAO_MS, VUC_CMD_UART_RCV_DATA_WRITE_PATH_TIMEOUT_S*1000, sal_locate(MABIAO_VUC, TYPE_STEP), &(vuc_dispatch->cmd_timer)); // for ispbnr 4M case
